title: stipa nelsonii var. dorei
intro: Stipa nelsonii var. dorei, commonly known as Nelson's needle grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Stipa nelsonii var. dorei can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various methods of consumption.
